title: Two Worlds
synopsis: ' is the first episode of Tenkai Knights. It first aired in the United States on Cartoon Network on August 24, 2013. Guren settles into his new town and meets a new friend, a hidden portal is uncovered. The episode begins with an explanation of the planet Quarton, which was affected by wars for the valuable resource known as Tenkai Energy. The wars were led by the evil Tenkai Knight, Vilius. title: Tenkai Dragon Cube
synopsis: ' is the second episode of Tenkai Knights. It first aired in the United States on Cartoon Network on August 31, 2013. Guren and Ceylan learn other human heroes can travel to Quarton. After Guren and Ceylan's first trip to Quarton, Mr. White, and Boreas fill them in on Quarton's history. Ceylan at first refuses to return to Quarton, but Guren insists they've been summoned to protect both worlds. title: The Rising Fire
synopsis: ' is the third episode of Tenkai Knights. It first aired in the United States on Cartoon Network on September 07, 2013. Guren and Ceylan track down and meet Chooki and Toxsa, the two other Earth boys who posses cores and became Tenkai Knights on Quarton! Their friendship gets off to a bumpy start. Guren and Ceylan transport back to Mr. White's Shop of Wonders and ask him about the two other Tenkai Knights they just met. title: The Power of Four
synopsis: ' is the fourth episode of Tenkai Knights. It first aired in the United States on Cartoon Network on September 14, 2013. The boys are starting come together as a team as they learn more about Quarton. While on Quarton - in search of the next Dragon Cube - the boys discover that they can combine their powers to become something more powerful. title: Vilius Revealed
synopsis: ' is the fifth episode of Tenkai Knights. It first aired in the United States on Cartoon Network on September 21, 2013. As the four heroes gain confidence after having gained another cube of the Tenkai Dragon, Vilius decides to make his epic presence felt. The Guardian warns the four about the danger of being over-confident, but the boys aren't really listening. title: The Tenkai Kid

A mysterious new student arrives in Benham City while on Quarton,Tributon fights to achieve Tenkai Titan mode. In the end, the Tenkai Knights face the appearance of Dromus, a doppleganger of Bravenwolf. The boys ask Guren how he achieved Titan Mode. title: Chooki's Mojo
synopsis: ' is the eighth episode of Tenkai Knights. It first aired in the United States on Cartoon Network on October 12, 2013. Chooki has always been good at sports, school, and, well, everything. But in order to save Toxsa, Chooki gets himself jinxed and becomes clumsy and unable to do what he's best at. The four travel back to Quarton, where Chooki unlocks his Tenkai Titan mode while overcoming the jinx. Chooki has always been good at sports, school, and, well, everything. title: Valley of Secrets
synopsis: ' (Japanese (Katakana): ビーグの導き) is the ninth episode of Tenkai Knights. It first aired on October 19, 2013 on Cartoon Network in the United States. Commander Beag sacrifices himself the save the Tenkai Knights from falling down into a canyon, causing them to develop a new Robofusion. They soon find out Beag is trapped in the Valley of Secrets and go to rescue him. They also find the fifth and last Dragon Cube inside the Valley.
